_comment: SINGLE source of truth for all ad-tech tracking IDs and conversion labels. Edit this file, rebuild, everything updates.

google_ads_conversions._comment: Create each in Google Ads > Tools > Conversions. Paste ONLY the label (the part AFTER the slash) below — e.g. if Google gives you 'AW-18091003527/AbC-D_eFgHi', paste AbC-D_eFgHi. Leave as empty string until created; the tracking code skips unconfigured conversions.

reddit_pixel_comment: Paste your Reddit Ads pixel ID here (format: a2_XXXXXXXXXXXX). Leave empty to disable. Get it at https://ads.reddit.com > Assets > Tracking > Create new pixel.
